bulletin.subject: Cherry-Pick ISIS PR ###PR### to LTS
bulletin.body:
Maintainers: Please cherry-pick this bugfix to ISIS LTS.

PR: ###PR###
SHA: ###SHA###

You may use the following commands to cherry-pick
(Assuming you have the DOI-USGS/ISIS3 repo as a remote named upstream):

git fetch upstream
git checkout -b cherry-###PR### upstream/###CURRENT_LTS###
git cherry-pick -m 1 ###SHA###

# Resolve Merge Conflicts Manually

# Then push to LTS
git push --set-upstream upstream ###CURRENT_LTS###
